channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 10.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Farage’s call for ‘rage’ at Nowak’s murder an ‘unforgivable’ snub to his family, says Starmer – UK politics live
item.description: Farage’s call for ‘rage’ at Nowak’s murder an ‘unforgivable’ snub to his family, says Starmer – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Henry Nowak latest: Starmer hits out at Farage’s ‘unforgivable’ response to murder - ‘It shows exactly who he is’
item.description: Henry Nowak latest: Starmer hits out at Farage’s ‘unforgivable’ response to murder - ‘It shows exactly who he is’

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer reads out powerful plea from Henry Nowak’s family in call for unity after violent clashes
item.description: Starmer reads out powerful plea from Henry Nowak’s family in call for unity after violent clashes

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham cancels call with hedge funds over ‘bond market pressure’ at short notice
item.description: Andy Burnham cancels call with hedge funds over ‘bond market pressure’ at short notice

item.title: BBC Politics: Scottish Secretary did not declare meeting with Mandelson's firm
item.description: Scottish Secretary did not declare meeting with Mandelson's firm

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Watch live: Starmer grilled at PMQs after violent clashes over Henry Nowak death
item.description: Watch live: Starmer grilled at PMQs after violent clashes over Henry Nowak death

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Cost of living and high street among top priorities for Makerfield voters, poll shows
item.description: Cost of living and high street among top priorities for Makerfield voters, poll shows

item.title: FT UK Politics: Policing minister says ‘wrong calls’ made amid anger over Henry Nowak murder
item.description: Policing minister says ‘wrong calls’ made amid anger over Henry Nowak murder

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Police anti-racism guidance ‘gives wrong impression’, minister admits after Henry Nowak murder
item.description: Police anti-racism guidance ‘gives wrong impression’, minister admits after Henry Nowak murder

item.title: Independent UK Politics: How Rayner played key role in Mandelson files release – and Labour’s humiliation
item.description: How Rayner played key role in Mandelson files release – and Labour’s humiliation
